message:
🐛 Fix leaderboard points mismatch between global and profile pages (#1535)

* 🐛 Fix leaderboard points mismatch on profile page

The profile page (/leaderboard/[username]) was showing stale points
because it relied solely on /data/contributors/{login}.json, which
is generated by generate-contributor-profiles.mjs. That script runs
with continue-on-error: true and a 5-minute timeout, so it silently
fails when TF-IDF clustering is slow — leaving profiles with old
total_points while leaderboard.json gets updated every 4 hours.

Fix: fetch /data/leaderboard.json in parallel and merge the
authoritative scoring fields (total_points, rank, level, level_rank)
into the profile before rendering. The contributor profile JSON is
still used for topic clusters, cadence, and suggestions.

Fixes kubestellar/docs#1532

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Remove agent CLI marker artifact from page.tsx

The file had '___BEGIN___COMMAND_DONE_MARKER___0' appended at EOF,
which is a CLI agent artifact that leaked into the committed source.
This caused TypeScript compilation to fail with TS2304.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
